assertions.description: All 3 sample contracts validate against schema
assertions.evidence: jsonschema.validate() succeeds for skill-audit.json, agent-attacker.json, orchestrator-debate.json

assertions.description: Invalid contracts are rejected by schema
assertions.evidence: 7 invalid contract tests pass: missing workflow_id, empty capability_checks, invalid grader_type, invalid category, empty rule_refs, lowercase rule_ref, missing check subfield

assertions.description: assert_matches_contract and assert_reasoning_dimensions_covered importable from assertions.py
Both pass and fail cases for each assertion helper
assertions.evidence: 5 pass/fail tests for assert_matches_contract, 6 pass/fail tests for assert_reasoning_dimensions_covered
91 workflow_harness tests pass, 4 existing assertion regression tests pass

assertions.description: Sample contract rule_refs match stable IDs from 3.1-04
assertions.evidence: All rule_refs (EXEC-INTEGRITY, GROUND-TRUTH, REPORT-INTEGRITY, EVIDENCE-CHAIN, TRANSCRIPT-AUTH, GATE-INTEGRITY) are in the 15-ID set
No pytest_rules_plugin.py or transcript_validator.py files exist
